bugs.description: agent edited the example server instead of the production root main.go
production main.go still does not serve the status endpoint
verification only covered the example tree or wrong binary instead of the production server
status handler does not return 405 for unsupported methods

false_positive_traps.description: The existence of examples/main.go is intentional and is not a bug by itself; only editing or verifying the wrong tree is a bug
